To the HR Director,

I am writing to formally place on record certain employment particulars that require your attention.

Ms Lucas Collins, currently residing at Unit 38, 192 Pitt Cres, Katherine NT 0880, is employed as a Software Engineer at Medicare Australia and holds the internal identifier Employee No: EMP47648. The engagement was established on a fixed-term contract basis, with a total remuneration package of $174,000 p.a.

I wish to draw your attention to the fact that during the negotiation process, a salary expectation of $76,000 – $96,000 p.a. was clearly communicated to the organisation in writing. There is therefore a significant discrepancy that warrants prompt review.

Should you need to make contact regarding this matter, correspondence can be directed to lucas.collins@gov.au, or alternatively by telephone on (03) 2099 2346.

I respectfully request that this matter be investigated without delay and confirm that all rights are reserved. For your HR records, please note the Personnel No: P744906 associated with this case.

Yours faithfully,
Lucas

Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to formally bring to your attention a matter that has arisen during the course of my employment, and I ask that it be treated with the appropriate degree of urgency.

By way of background, my name is Mr Ryan Harris, and I reside at Unit 28, 108 King Lane, Devonport TAS 7320. I was born on 11-07-2001. I am currently living in a de facto relationship, and I want to note that I also serve, or have served, as a Major, Royal Australian Air Force, which I understand may be relevant to certain entitlements. Additionally, I carry the responsibility of being the primary carer for elderly parent, and these personal circumstances are disclosed because they may engage the organisation's equity and inclusion obligations.

With regard to the vehicle involved in this matter, it is registered as ACT E4437, and I understand that a separate insurance matter is being handled in relation to that registration, ACT E4437.

I also wish to draw attention to my current financial position, as it is directly relevant to any settlement discussions that may follow. Specifically, I am carrying a student debt of $26,841, and this outstanding obligation must be taken into account when any resolution is considered.

I respectfully request a prompt and thorough investigation into the matters I have outlined above, and I wish to make clear that I reserve all rights in relation to this correspondence.

Yours faithfully,
Ryan
